problem: What causes chronic fatigue syndrome — no biomarker or mechanism identified
mechanism: Photodynamic therapy targeting specific cell receptors
hypothesis: Combining Photodynamic therapy targeting specific cell receptors with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Retrospective cohort analysis with 15 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
